name: Annexin Pharmaceuticals AB (publ)
summary: Annexin Pharmaceuticals AB (publ), a biotechnology company, engages in developing drug candidates for the treatment of various cardiovascular diseases. The company develops ANXV, a human recombinant protein. It offers Annexin A5 to protect and repair blood vessels and counteract inflammation. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
